packageRules.description: TS 7 ships no programmatic compiler API; typescript-eslint needs it (peer <6.1.0) and crashes at load. Revisit when TS 7.1 lands and typescript-eslint announces support.
The e2e image ships browsers under a build-number path the npm client resolves exactly (chromium_headless_shell-<build>). Bumped apart, each MR breaks the other's e2e job.
